mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO documents (title, content, embedding, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content},
#{embedding}::vector NULL , NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id::text AS id, title, content, created_at, updated_at FROM documents ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id::text AS id, title, content, created_at, updated_at, ROUND(CAST(1 - (embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) AS NUMERIC), 4) AS similarity FROM documents WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id::text AS id, title, content, created_at, updated_at, ROUND(CAST(1 - (embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) AS NUMERIC), 4) AS similarity FROM documents WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL AND 1 - (embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) >= #{threshold} ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
